Self-Hosted AI Stack: Complete Architecture

25 min readUpdated May 2026

This guide is being written. Full content coming soon — subscribe to the newsletter to get notified.

Production self-hosted AI: Ollama + vLLM + Open WebUI + Nginx + monitoring. Docker Compose, scaling strategies.

In the meantime, check out our Ollama Complete Guide or the Local LLM on Linux guide for related content.
